summary: Frontend testing of new fixes: send button z-index fix and AI routing (service invoices → crear_causacion vs products → registrar_factura_compra). Tested all 6 requested features.

ui_bugs.issue: Send button STILL blocked at physical coordinates (1882, 1042). The Emergent badge has z-index:9999 which is higher than input area z-index:50. Playwright force=True click does NOT clear the input. However, JS sendBtn.click() WORKS, and pressing Enter also works. For real users at 1920x1080, the badge may still intercept click on the button.
ui_bugs.evidence: elementAtSendBtn: 'P ' (a paragraph element, not the button) at coordinates (1882,1042). Badge z-index: 9999 > input container z-index: 50.

test_results.test_2_send_button_click: PARTIAL - JS click (sendBtn.click()) works and clears input. Playwright force=True physical click fails (badge z-index:9999 blocks coordinates). Real user click behavior unknown.
test_results.test_3_arrendamiento_causacion: PASS - AI correctly routes 'Causar arrendamiento de $3.000.000 para febrero 2026' to causacion analysis. Shows NIIF accounts [5205] Arrendamiento de Oficinas, [5118] ReteFuente 3.5%, [5070] CxP proveedores. Markdown rendering works correctly.
test_results.test_4_motos_factura_compra: INCOMPLETE - Message sent to AI, response still loading when test ended (20s wait). AI showed typing indicator.
test_results.test_5_confirm_causacion: NOT TESTED - AI asked for supplier name before executing, no confirm card appeared without providing supplier info.
test_results.test_6_clear_history: PASS - Clear chat button (trash icon) works and shows 'Historial borrado' message

action_items: CRITICAL: Increase z-index of the input area to higher than 9999 (e.g., zIndex:10000) to properly override the Emergent badge. The current fix of zIndex:50 is insufficient because badge has zIndex:9999.
For TEST 4 and TEST 5: Need longer wait or separate session to verify motos → registrar_factura_compra routing and confirm button execution.
critical_code_review_comments: Send button z-index fix (50) is insufficient vs Emergent badge (9999). Should use zIndex: 10000 or higher on the input container div in AgentChatPage.js line 598
AI causacion analysis working correctly - shows proper NIIF accounting entries with ReteFuente calculations
ReactMarkdown rendering is working - bold text, bullet points, tables all render correctly in AI responses
context_for_next_testing_agent: Send button z-index fix still broken (50 vs badge 9999). JS sendBtn.click() works, Enter works. TEST 3 (arrendamiento→causacion) PASS. TEST 4 (motos→factura_compra) incomplete - need 25+ second wait. TEST 5 (confirm execution) not testable until supplier info provided. Use JS click helper for sending messages in tests.

rca_of_send_button_issue.root_cause: Emergent badge has inline style z-index:9999. Input container was given z-index:50 in the fix, but 50 < 9999. Physical click on send button coordinates is intercepted by badge element.
rca_of_send_button_issue.reproduction:
At 1920x1080 viewport, document.elementFromPoint(1882, 1042) returns a

element (badge content) instead of the send button.
rca_of_send_button_issue.mitigation: Change zIndex in AgentChatPage.js line 598 from 50 to 10000: style={{ borderTop: '1px solid #E2E8F0', zIndex: 10000 }}
